CONTENT.Club career: On 24 May 2018, Gboho signed his first professional contract with Rennes. He made his debut for the club in the 2019 Trophée des Champions, losing 2–1 to Paris Saint-Germain on 3 August 2019. He scored his first Ligue 1 goal on 27 October 2019, a stoppage time winner in a 3–2 home victory over Toulouse.On 22 July 2021, Gboho joined Vitesse in the Netherlands on loan.On 19 August 2022, Gboho signed a three-year contract with Cercle Brugge in Belgium.On 8 January 2024, Gboho returned to France, joining Ligue 1 side Toulouse for a reported fee of €2.5 million.
CONTENT.Personal life: Gboho's uncle, Ambroise, is also a professional footballer. As are his cousins, Guéla and Désiré Doué.

SUMMARY: Gnantin Yann-Alexandre Gboho (born 14 January 2001) is a professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder for Ligue 1 club Toulouse. Born in Ivory Coast, he is a former France youth international.
